file.content:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="bunit" Version="2.*" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite" Version="10.*" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <Content Remove="Locales\*.json" />
    <EmbeddedResource Include="Locales\*.json" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <Using Include="BootstrapBlazor.Server.Data" />
    <Using Include="Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection" />
    <Using Include="UnitTest.Extensions" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor.Server\Data\CustomTreeItem.cs" Link="Misc\CustomTreeItem.cs" />
    <Compile Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor.Server\Data\Foo.cs" Link="Misc\Foo.cs" />
    <Compile Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor.Server\Data\TreeFoo.cs" Link="Misc\TreeFoo.cs" />
    <Compile Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor.Server\Extensions\IpExtensions.cs" Link="Extensions\IpExtensions.cs" />
    <Compile Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor\Components\Table\InternalTableColumn.cs" Link="Misc\InternalTableColumn.cs" />
    <Compile Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor\Extensions\DateTimeExtensions.cs" Link="Extensions\DateTimeExtensions.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\..\src\BootstrapBlazor\BootstrapBlazor.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <Content Include="Plugins\Test.dll">
      <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory>
    </Content>
    <None Remove="Plugins\Test.dll" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <None Update="appsettings.json">
      <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory>
    </None>
    <None Update="FooTest.db">
      <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory>
    </None>
    <None Update="zh-CN.json">
      <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory>
    </None>
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <Using Include="BootstrapBlazor.Components"/>
    <Using Include="Bunit"/>
    <Using Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components"/>
    <Using Include="UnitTest.Core"/>
  </ItemGroup>
  
</Project>

content.text:
Implemented the DynamicElement fix.

Changes made:
- Added `OnTouchStart` and `OnTouchEnd` parameters to `DynamicElement`.
- Wired them to `ontouchstart` and `ontouchend` render-tree attributes.
- Added internal trigger handlers that pass through `TouchEventArgs`.
- Ensured touch handlers can cause an element to be generated when `GenerateElement` is false, consistent with click/double-click behavior.
- Reverted `DynamicElement` implementing `IAsyncDisposable` and removed the disposal implementation.
- Removed the temporary regression tests after validating the fix, per instructions.

Validation performed:

result:
Implemented the DynamicElement fix.

Changes made:
- Added `OnTouchStart` and `OnTouchEnd` parameters to `DynamicElement`.
- Wired them to `ontouchstart` and `ontouchend` render-tree attributes.
- Added internal trigger handlers that pass through `TouchEventArgs`.
- Ensured touch handlers can cause an element to be generated when `GenerateElement` is false, consistent with click/double-click behavior.
- Reverted `DynamicElement` implementing `IAsyncDisposable` and removed the disposal implementation.
- Removed the temporary regression tests after validating the fix, per instructions.

- Created temporary tests reproducing:
  - missing touch parameters/events
  - unwanted `IAsyncDisposable` implementation

- Deleted the temporary tests.
- Ran the remaining `DynamicElementTest` successfully:
  - `Passed: 1`
- Built the BootstrapBlazor project successfully across target frameworks:
  - `net6.0`, `net7.0`, `net8.0`, `net9.0`, `net10.0`
